title: No Other Choice
tmdbOverview: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market, a veteran paper mill manager descends into violence in a desperate bid to reclaim his dignity.
synopsis: No Other Choice is a 2025 comedy, crime and thriller film from South Korea and France. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
